meta.description: Defines Latvia as a nation — its boxing culture, regional geography tags, and where to find its name pool. The boxingCulture scale (1-5) reflects how embedded boxing is in the national consciousness: 1 is a fringe sport, 3 is respected but not dominant, 5 is a national obsession. Latvia sits at 3 — boxing has genuine roots and produces real fighters, but it competes with other sports for attention. National attribute modifiers are not implemented here; they will be added once the attribute system is built.

label: Latvia
description: A small Baltic nation that punches above its weight. Soviet-era sporting infrastructure left a legacy of discipline and structure. Amateur boxing is respected; professional boxing is growing. Fighters tend toward toughness over flash — hard conditions breed hard people.

physicalProfile.note: Overrides universal physical-stats.json probabilities for fighters generated from Latvia. Only bands that differ from universal defaults are listed.
